campaign_concept.name: Maison Autumn 2026
campaign_concept.objective: Drive consideration and purchase intent for autumn collection among HNW consumers
campaign_concept.description: Premium brand campaign for autumn collection launch across European luxury markets
campaign_concept.target_audience: HNW individuals 30-55, luxury fashion buyers, Paris/Milan/London

agt03_concept.name: L'Automne Éternel
agt03_concept.tagline: Crafted for those who define the season
agt03_concept.strategic_narrative: Mass luxury brands chase virality; we reclaim exclusivity through scarcity and editorial gravitas.

audience_segmentation.primary: HNW women 35-50, Paris and London fashion insiders

channel_mix.competitor_gap: Competitors over-post; we curate fewer, higher-quality moments

channel_mix.rationale: Vogue Paris/IT/UK for HNW print readers
channel_mix.competitor_gap: Competitors shifting to digital; we dominate premium print

channel_mix.rationale: Exclusive preview events for top-tier clientele
channel_mix.competitor_gap: Competitors scale events; we restrict access

message_architecture.master_message: Autumn, as it was always meant to be worn

channel_adaptations.Instagram: Editorial campaign imagery, no product tags

campaign_phasing.awareness: Weeks 1-2: Press and editor preview + print placement
campaign_phasing.engagement: Weeks 3-6: Instagram editorial series + event invitations
campaign_phasing.conversion: Weeks 7-8: Private sale access + personal stylist CTA

tone_board.visual_direction: Rich amber and charcoal palette, film photography aesthetic, serif typography
